description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust metallic head and a straight, dark wooden handle. The head is composed of two main parts: a flat striking face for driving nails and a curved claw for prying and removing nails. The handle is cylindrical, smooth, and tapers slightly towards the end, providing a comfortable grip. The metallic head has a matte, slightly rough finish, with no visible branding or markings. The hammer appears well-crafted, with no visible signs of wear, rust, or damage. Its proportions and materials suggest it is suitable for general carpentry or household tasks in urban environments.
description: A traditional claw hammer with a metallic head and a straight, dark wooden handle, designed for driving and removing nails. The hammer is clean, undamaged, and features a smooth, ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the profile of the metallic head with its striking face and claw.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded end of the handle and the width of the hammer head, with the claw and striking face visible in alignment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle and the reverse profile of the hammer head, including the curvature of the claw.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the hammer head, clearly showing the split claw and the handle extending away.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, cylindrical, smooth, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a curved, split claw for nail removal
